caption: A news report features a man in a grey vest and light-colored shirt speaking into a cluster of microphones, including one with an "ANI" logo and another with a "PTC" logo. He is surrounded by several other people, including men and women, some of whom are wearing scarves. In the top left frame, the on-screen text at the top reads "कांग्रेस छठ", while the others display "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A red and yellow banner at the bottom across all frames states "BREAKING NEWS" and lists the time as "10:05 PM", with a "MAHARASHTRA" label. The right side of the screen shows small portrait photos of men with accompanying text: "मंत्री विजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार". The left side of the screen shows portraits of men with text including "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". The speaker's expressions and the positions of the people around him shift slightly as the scene progresses.
